steps: Go to student affairs office
Bring 2 passport photos
Pay replacement fee
dont: Do not delay more than 3 days

steps: Check add/drop deadline
Get add/drop form from Registrar
Get approval from your advisor
Submit form to Registrar
Confirm changes in system
dont: Do not miss deadline
Do not add courses without approval

steps: Go to ICT support office
Provide your student ID
Request password reset
Receive temporary password
Login and change password immediately
dont: Do not share your password
Do not use weak passwords

steps: Go to the Registrar Office immediately
Explain your reason for missing registration
Fill late registration request form
Pay penalty fee if approved
Complete course registration
dont: Do not ignore deadlines
Do not wait until semester progresses too far

steps: Contact your course instructor first
Request grade clarification
If unresolved, go to Department Head
Submit formal complaint form
Wait for review decision
dont: Do not skip instructor discussion
Do not submit complaint without evidence

steps: Collect clearance form from Registrar
Visit all required offices (Library, Dorm, Finance)
Get signatures from each office
Submit completed form to Registrar
Wait for final approval
dont: Do not miss any required office
Do not submit incomplete forms

steps: Go to Registrar Office
Fill transcript request form
Specify number of copies
Pay required fee
Collect transcript after processing
dont: Do not provide incorrect personal details
Do not forget payment receipt

steps: Report the specific time and librarian names to the Student Union office (Block 04)
Submit a written complaint to the Library Administration
Request designated silent zones in the library
Follow up with the Student Union if no response within 3 days
dont: Do not confront librarians directly
Do not ignore the issue during exam preparation
library_noise_disruption.office: Student Union Office (Block 04) or Library Administration

steps: Identify the specific block and floor with water shortage
Report to the Student Union office (Block 04) with details
Request 24-hour water supply for affected blocks
If unresolved, file a complaint at the Campus Administration Office
dont: Do not assume all blocks have the same issue
Do not wait for others to report

steps: Document the non-functioning taps and pipes
Report to dormitory administration or Student Union
Request equal access to washing facilities for all genders
Ask for repair of broken water pipes and additional clotheslines
dont: Do not remove others' clothes without permission
Do not damage facilities further
laundry_and_washing_facilities.office: Dormitory Administration or Student Union Office

steps: Check library posted hours immediately
Report closure during exam hours to Student Union
Request extended exam-time hours from library management
Organize a petition if repeated issue
dont: Do not assume it will open later
Do not wait until exams are over to complain
library_closed_during_exams.office: Library Administration or Student Union Office

steps: Take a photo of the poor quality food
Report to the Cafeteria Committee or Student Union
Request inspection of kitchen and ingredients
Ask for a weekly food quality report
dont: Do not throw food without evidence
Do not blame individual workers without proof

steps: Ask the Student Union to reschedule repairs after exams
Request alternative secure storage for phones/laptops during repair
Be present in your room during scheduled repair hours
Report any missing items immediately to Block 04
dont: Do not leave valuables unattended during repair
Do not skip being present if warned in advance

steps: Ask library staff for available chargers at the desk
Report missing or broken chargers to library administration
Request a sign-out system for chargers
Consider bringing your own backup charger
dont: Do not take chargers from other students
Do not leave chargers unattended

steps: Note the specific block, floor, and bathroom number
Report to dormitory maintenance or Student Union
Request 24-hour water and working lights
Follow up weekly until resolved
dont: Do not use the bathroom if it's hazardous
Do not attempt electrical repairs yourself
dormitory_shower_and_bathroom_lighting.office: Dormitory Maintenance or Student Union Office

steps: Propose a specific extended hour (e.g., 2:30 AM) to the Student Union
Gather signatures from fellow students
Submit request to Campus Security Office
Request temporary extension during exam periods
dont: Do not climb gates or force entry
Do not violate existing curfew without permission
campus_gate_entry_hour.office: Campus Security Office or Student Union
